positive: Minimalist abstract depiction of a rising sun behind stylized mountain peaks. Use thick, clean silhouette lines in negative space composition. Color palette: deep indigo blue, warm burnt orange, and muted terracotta red. The sun is a perfect semicircle, casting geometric, stylized rays that fill the composition. The style should be modern, clean graphic design suitable for screen printing, highly stylized vector art. Flat composition, high contrast, symmetry, centered on a single vertical axis. Perfect for apparel art.
negative: blurry, artifacts, text, watermark, logo, signature, noisy, bad anatomy, extra limbs, poor composition, gradient (unless intended), complex details, photorealism
